scripts.docs:generate: api-documenter markdown -i temp -o apps/docs/src/content/docs/api && node apps/docs/inject-frontmatter.js
scripts.docs:build: pnpm build && pnpm docs:generate && pnpm --filter apps-docs astro build
scripts.docs:dev: pnpm build && pnpm docs:generate && pnpm --filter apps-docs astro dev
